allow: Bash(node -e "d='''''''';process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\(''''All keys:'''', Object.keys\(j\)\);Object.entries\(j\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>{if\(v?.error\) console.log\(k+'''': ERROR -'''',v.error.substring\(0,200\)\); else if\(typeof v===''''object''''\) console.log\(k+'''': keys='''',Object.keys\(v||{}\).slice\(0,10\)\); else console.log\(k+'''':'''',JSON.stringify\(v\)?.substring\(0,100\)\)}\)}\)")
